properties.Description: From Staford to Kotambe paddy field
properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Marking Reservation and  Prevention of waste Accumulation
properties.Observation: This canal comes under minor irrigation. Please refer under format no.15
During the rainy season when too much water flows, Bank erosion occurs
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Paving of available stone in the stream banks to prevent bank erosion in where necessary and Planting areca nut tree, Bamboo and apala where necessary

properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Construction of Side wall on both sides to prevent embankment erosion
properties.Observation: Flowing through vegetable fields. Bank erosion has occurred due to the cultivation of vegetables  on the banks of the stream. Large trees cannot be planted due to vegetables are cultivated on both sides of the stream.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Reserve marking on the both sides of the stream should be made to prevent banks erosion. Stone terraces should be constructed in the necessary places, Plants such as bamboo and areca nut should be planted in suitable places.

properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Construction of Side wall on both sides to prevent embankment erosion
properties.Observation: Flowing through vegetable fields. Bank erosion has occurred due to the cultivation of vegetables  on the banks of the stream. Large trees cannot be planted due to vegetables are cultivated on both sides of the stream. In some places, Concrete wall have been built along the banks of the stream.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Reserve marking on the both sides of the stream should be made to prevent banks erosion. Stone terraces should be constructed in the necessary places, Plants such as bamboo and areca nut should be planted in suitable places. Construction of 300m long side wall along the banks of the stream in where necessary.

properties.Observation: Canal that taken water for farming purposes in several divisions including Senarathpura and Roopaha Divisions. The canal has been concreted in some places. The damaged places of the canal should be concreted and the remaining places should be preserved by plants trees along the canal banks.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Paving of available stone in the stream banks to prevent bank erosion in where necessary and Planting areca nut tree and apala where necessary and Construction of 1000m long 900mm x 600mm (width x height) Rectangular Con. canal. Wall thickness 125mm in where necessary
